title: Rate Limiting
summary: Protect your API with token-bucket or sliding-window limits: return 429 when clients exceed quotas instead of melting your service.

title: Retries & Backoff
summary: Exponential backoff and jitter for client retries — avoid retry storms while still recovering from transient failures.

title: Circuit Breaker
summary: Stop calling a failing downstream from every request — open the circuit, fail fast, and half-open to probe recovery.
